title: thelypteris interrupta
intro: Thelypteris interrupta, also known as the interrupted lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae and is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Thelypteris interrupta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches and joint pain, and promote overall well-being. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments and promote health and wellness.
